title: Completion and publication of clinical trials in a cooperative group: a cohort study of trials of the Swiss Group for Clinical Cancer Research (SAKK).
author: Hayoz S Kasenda B Schenker AL Kopp C Schar S Thurlimann B von Moos R Pless M
content:
S-EPMC10124283 PMC10124283 Completion and publication of clinical trials in a cooperative group: a cohort study of trials of the Swiss Group for Clinical Cancer Research (SAKK).

Background

Premature trial discontinuation and non-publication of trial results are still major issues negatively
